1050401.name: Obsessive Hammer
1050401.desc: When below 50% HP, remove 1 negative status effect and gain 1 [Assemble], 1 [Enhancement], and 3 [Protection] at the start of the combat phase.

1050421.name: Highest Honor
1050421.desc:
Apply 1 [Enhancement] and 1 [Protection] to the ally with the least HP below 50%.
If the ally is an 'N Corp. [Assemble]', also apply 1 [Assemble].
